name: wake
description: Spawn or attach to an oracle session

cli.help: maw wake <oracle|org/repo|URL> [task] [--task '<prompt>'] [--wt <name>] [--layout nested|legacy] [--fresh|--new] [--pick] [--name <s>] [--no-attach] [--issue N] [--pr N] [--repo org/name] [--list] [--peer <alias>]  (default layout: nested repo/agents/N-X; --layout legacy uses .wt-N-X)
